programmes.show_description: Joining Radio 5 Live.
Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
An act of worship with Church of Scotland minister Rev Gillean Maclean in Inverness.
Two hours of music and conversation with a faith and ethical perspective. Taking the week's events to ask what they say about our values and beliefs.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
Live commentary from Tannadice as Dundee Utd take on Celtic in the Premiership (KO 1230).
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Join Gary as he shares your special messages and dedications and plays your favourite Scottish Music requests.
Jamie MacDougall features a performance of Mendelssohn's Violin Concerto by Nicola Benedetti and the Scottish Chamber Orchestra, and the BBC SSO perform music by Benjamin Britten.
Stephanie Cheape describes her perfect weekend and DO Gallagher provides our Sunday Soundwave, plus new music from Little Acres, Radhika featuring Mitch Mitchell and Jesca Hoop.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Connie McLaughlin gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Michelle McManus brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Actor Tom Chambers, Matt Hickman on Brownbear's show at Queens Hall, Edinburgh, and singer-songwriter Étáin.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.
Tonight we could be stomping 500 miles, perhaps have Miles to Go or simply So Far Away. We're after the songs that mention distances.
Indie anthems from The Verve and The Jesus & Mary Chain, and new Scottish music from Hollie Cook and Siobhan Wilson. Tonight's Slow Club features Aphex Twin and Squarepusher.
1/4. The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
